sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Mega Man - Charge Shot
special_mechanics.description: Mega Man is able to charge his shots to make them more powerful

special_mechanics.name: Mega Man - Slide
special_mechanics.description: Mega Man can slide and fire while moving

special_mechanics.name: Bass - Rapid Fire
special_mechanics.description: Bass can rapidly fire his arm cannon in eight directions (not seven as caption suggests; text states eight)

physics_values.note: Shots cannot pass through walls unless equipped with upgrade

special_mechanics.name: Bass - Double Jump
special_mechanics.description: Bass is able to jump a second time in mid-air

special_mechanics.name: Bass - Dash
special_mechanics.description: Bass can dash along the ground, similar to X in Mega Man X series

special_mechanics.name: Bass - Dash Jump
special_mechanics.description: Performing dash and double-jump simultaneously allows Bass to cross great distances

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics descriptions but lacks precise physics values (velocities, acceleration rates, gravity constants). Character ability descriptions documented but numerical parameters not available.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Mega Man & Bass article (Gameplay section)
